subcodes.first_line: Thou beholdest, O my God, Thy servant who dwelleth in this prison-house, wholly detached from any one but Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی تری عبدک جالسا فی السجن منقطعا عن دونک و ناظرا الی افق عنایتک و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude
